## beehiiv automation-emails list

List the emails inside an automation

### Synopsis

List automation emails

Retrieve all emails belonging to a specific automation, including engagement statistics for each email.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/automations/{automationId}/emails

```
beehiiv automation-emails list <automationId> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv automation-emails list aut_123
beehiiv automations emails aut_123 --all
```

### Options

```
      --all                 Fetch every page and aggregate the results
  -h, --help                help for list
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
